name: Golik Holdings Limited
summary: Golik Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells metal products and building construction materials in Hong Kong and Mainland China. The company offers steel coil products, including cold rolled, galvanized, aluminum coated, silicon, electrolytic tinplate, and electrical steel products; and elevator, crane, and oilfield ropes. It also provides steel wire products, such as carbon steel spring wires, piano wires, bedding spring wires, core wires for ACSR conductors, and galvanized low carbon steel wires for cable armoring; galvanized wire strands, fiber optic cable strength members, and zinc-coated steel strands; and steel wire ropes. In addition, the company distributes reinforcing steel bars, sheet piles, and H-beams; and offers reinforcing steel products, services, and accessories, including reinforcement solutions, bored pile cages, lattice girders, rebar couplers, Hy-Rib formworks, and concreting accessories, as well as expanded metal meshes, beads and laths, lintels, and corrugated sheets. Further, it produces and supplies ready mixed concrete for the construction industry; and operates a decoiling center and concrete batching plants. Additionally, the company provides concrete and metal products, and warehousing services, as well as engages in the property holding activities. Golik Holdings Limited was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
